evals.name: preprocessing-test-generation
evals.prompt: Generate tests for a preprocessing module at src/preprocessing.py that handles missing values, encodes categoricals, and scales numerics. Make sure we hit 80% coverage.
evals.expected_output: Should generate unit tests for each transformer, integration test for full pipeline, edge case tests, and run with coverage.

assertions.text: Generates unit tests for individual preprocessing functions
Tests edge cases like missing values, empty inputs, or unexpected types
Runs tests with pytest and shows results
Reports test coverage percentage and validates against 80% threshold
